name: polymarket-moneymaker-v3-paper
description: Polymarket MoneyMaker V3 paper EV engine with public data research, modular strategies, consensus routing, whale oracle, ghost calibration, paper execution, and risk controls.

scripts.pm2:reset: pm2 delete langomonEscript || true && pm2 flush && rm -f moneymaker_v3_state.json
scripts.pm2:fresh: pm2 delete langomonEscript || true && pm2 flush && pm2 start ./moneymaker_v3.js --name langomonEscript --update-env
